sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 유나이티드헬스 그룹이 2025년 연간 조정 주당순이익(EPS) 전망치를 재확인했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 2025년 연간 실적에 대한 최종 결산 절차가 진행 중이며, 최종 결과는 현재의 전망치 범위와 다를 수 있습니다.

businessChanges.text: 경영진은 투자자들과의 미팅을 통해 회사의 주요 재무 목표와 전망을 공유하는 소통 활동을 진행했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 2025년 연간 실적에 대한 최종 결산 절차가 진행 중이며, 최종 결과는 현재의 전망치 범위와 다를 수 있습니다.

watchItems.text: 현재 진행 중인 2025년 연간 결산 절차 완료 후 발표될 최종 실적 수치와 기존 전망치 간의 차이 여부를 확인해야 합니다.

evidence.sourceTextDigest: 1933 (§230.405 of this chapter) or Rule 12b-2 of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934 (§240.12b-2 of this chapter). ☐ Emerging growth company If an emerging growth company, indicate by check mark if the registrant has elected not to use the extended transition period for complying with any new or revised financial accounting standards provided pursuant to Section 13(a) of the Exchange Act. ☐ Item 7.01 Regulation FD Disclosure. On January 12, 2026, members of the senior management team of UnitedHealth Group will meet with investors. During the meetings, the senior management team intends to reaffirm our adjusted 2025 earnings per share expectations previously disclosed by the Company on October 28, 2025. Our financial closing procedures for the full-year 2025 are not yet complete and, as a result, our actual results may change as a result of such financial closing procedures, final adjustm

ents, management’s review of results, and other developments that may arise between now and the time our financial results for the full-year 2025 are finalized, and our results could be outside of the ranges set forth above. The information in this Item 7.01 shall not be deemed "filed" for purposes of Section 18 of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, nor shall it be deemed incorporated by reference in any Company filing under the Securities Act of 1933 or the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, except as shall be expressly set forth by specific reference in such filing. SIGNATURES Pursuant to the requirements of the Securities Exchange Act of 1934, the registrant has duly caused this report to be signed on its behalf by the undersigned hereunto duly authorized. Date: January 12, 2026 UNITEDHEALTH GROUP INCORPORATED By: /s/ Kuai H. Leong Kuai H. Leong Senior Deputy General Counsel and Deput
